query: Audit our agency chatbot against the Gen-AI SSP overlay. It sends prompts to an overseas API, logs conversations, accepts ZIP uploads, and has no output evaluation or hallucination acknowledgement.
Design a public-facing RAG assistant on GCC 2.0 with classification-aware provider routing, no-log/no-train terms, safe uploads, model-change evaluation gates, and user risk acknowledgement.
Can a ministry send CONFIDENTIAL case records to this overseas LLM API? Apply GA-1 and GA-2 data-classification boundaries and propose a compliant architecture.
Review a self-hosted open-weights model that loads pytorch_model.bin with torch.load on a shared GPU host. Check the approved environment, format, and loader requirements in our SSP.
Build a secure document-upload flow for a government GenAI assistant: no bulk archives, type and size checks, per-file classification, DLP scanning, extraction controls, and DP-8 disclosure.
Create an evaluation harness for an agency LLM feature covering accuracy, safety, prompt injection, jailbreaks, and output quality, with launch thresholds and reruns after model or prompt changes.
Our vendor says API traffic is not used for training but the contract is silent on logging and prompt-cache retention. Assess GA-3 and identify the binding agreement we need.
Review an agentic government assistant that can call internal tools. Apply the GenAI controls to prompts, retrieved data, tool outputs, file inputs, model hosting, and user-facing limitations.
The app uses safetensors but the loader version floats and the SSP's approved format and loader parameters are blank. Produce a finding without inventing the approved list.
Prepare launch evidence for GA-1 through GA-8 plus DP-8 for a Singapore Government LLM service, including provider, hosting, uploads, evaluation, and acknowledgement controls.
Fix ordinary SQL injection, CSP, password hashing, session expiry, and hardcoded secrets in an Express app with no AI functionality.
Set up a generic OpenAI API call for my personal recipe chatbot. It only handles public recipe text and has no Singapore Government context.
Configure host EDR, OS patching, CIS hardening, Session Manager, NTP, and end-of-support asset tracking.
Audit S3 residency, RDS encryption, TLS, GCC tenant placement, retired-disk sanitisation, and DLP for a non-AI case system.
Build GitHub Actions with branch protection, SAST, SCA, SBOMs, signed artifacts, OIDC, and environment segregation.
Review Singpass FAPI 2.0 PAR, PKCE, DPoP, identity claims, Myinfo scopes, and app onboarding.
Set up security.txt, independent penetration tests, authenticated host scans, CSPM, and vulnerability remediation deadlines.
Design network segmentation, private endpoints, WAF, DDoS protection, IDS, and VPN controls for our cloud estate.
Write marketing copy warning that AI can make mistakes. There is no product implementation, security review, or government context.
Choose the appropriate cybersecurity SSP and DSS profile for a new agency digital service before we design any controls.
